steps.title: Use the secondary-feature clue
steps.content: The passage says image sharing was originally a secondary feature and became the app's centerpiece only after its popularity became clear. The blank must describe image sharing as lower in importance than the app's original location-sharing purpose.

steps.title: Reject mismatched meanings
steps.content: Choice B has no logical relationship to the app's purpose. Choice C is unrelated to importance or hierarchy. Choice D would mean image sharing was essential to the original purpose, contradicting the clue that it was secondary. The answer is A.
